videos.headline: Kansas opens season with win vs. Fresno State
videos.description: Kansas makes easy work of Fresno State to start the season with a win.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Kansas opens season with win vs. Fresno State) 2025/08/23 ESHEET
